summary: HODIX v2 backend tested end-to-end with 41 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_hodix_v2.py. Result: 40 passed, 1 skipped (only one super_admin in DB so the delete-super_admin guard could not be exercised). All v2 features verified: 3-role migration (member/tontine_manager/super_admin), promotion request flow (create/duplicate-guard/list/approve/reject + notifications + role bump), member 5-member tontine guard (>5 -> 403, =5 -> 200, no auto-promotion), manager overview & members endpoints (groups, total_members=8, avg_compliance=100, health_score>0 from YAOUNDE seed), me/platform analytics time-series (14/30 datapoints with YYYY-MM-DD), reports-b64 (identity/trust-score/savings PDFs decode to %PDF magic), and admin user mgmt (suspend revokes sessions, restore, delete guards for self & super_admin). v1 regression (savings goals, tontines list, trust-score, identity, notifications) still healthy. One critical bug was found and FIXED during testing: routes_tontines.py used variable `code` before assignment (NameError on every tontine creation) -- replaced with code = _gen_code(). Test data was cleaned up after the run.
action_items: Nothing blocking. Optional: tighten POST /api/promotion-requests to return 403 (not 400) when caller is non-member, since this is an authorization issue, not a validation one. Current behaviour (400) is documented as acceptable in the spec so I aligned the test with the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED during testing: /app/backend/routes_tontines.py create_tontine referenced an undefined variable `code` in the tontine dict before any assignment (only `_gen_code()` exists). Without this fix every POST /api/tontines would raise NameError -> 500. Patched to define `code = _gen_code()` just before the dict literal.

Auto-seed only runs when DB is empty (server.py line ~81). For dev iterations where TEST_* data accumulates this can mask state -- consider an admin /seed/reset endpoint or scripted cleanup so the seed-derived expectations (avg_compliance=100, total_members=8) stay deterministic across test runs.
passlib bcrypt deprecation warning at startup (AttributeError: module 'bcrypt' has no attribute '__about__'). Harmless but noisy -- pin passlib>=1.7.5 or downgrade bcrypt to 4.0.x.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes_tontines.py (fix NameError: define code = _gen_code() before tontine dict)
/app/backend/tests/test_hodix_api.py (updated old role enum assertion to new v2 roles)
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed changes. Tests create transient TEST_* users / tontines / promotion-requests and cleanup script removes them after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use test_hodix_v2.py as regression suite. Before re-running, if previous run was interrupted, manually drop TEST_* tontines from MongoDB or rely on the in-test cleanup. Seed expectations: manager@hodix.app admins YAOUNDE (8 members, 16 contribs each 5000 XAF = 80000 collected, avg_compliance=100). Skipped test test_admin_cannot_delete_super_admin needs a second super_admin in the DB to be exercised.
rca_of_issue: POST /api/tontines was throwing NameError because the variable `code` was used in the tontine dict but never defined; only the helper _gen_code() exists in the file. Fix: `code = _gen_code()` assigned right before the dict literal. Verified by TestMemberTontineGuard::test_member_can_create_small returning 200 with invite_code, and TestManagerCreate::test_manager_can_create_large passing.
